reviews.comment:
Buen puesto de parada en la ruta, con excelente servicio, sanitarios impecables, precios muy razonables, y bastante buena mercadería para consumir “de paso” o llevar: la docena de medialunas 500 pesos (bastante decorosas).

(Translated by Google)
Good rest stop on the road, with excellent service, spotless restrooms, very reasonable prices, and quite good merchandise to eat "on the go" or take away: a dozen croissants 500 pesos (quite decent).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHb2RmMnV3RRAB

reviews.comment:
El código de barras para hacer el dto. Lo sacaban de un cajón, nunca visto en otris lugares y me echaban la culpa de que en mi celular no funcionaba.Todo para no hacerme el descuento.Todo un grupo.No paren allí,yo no paro más en ese lugar trucho.

(Translated by Google)
The barcode for the discount? They pulled it out of a drawer, something I'd never seen anywhere else, and blamed me for it not working on my phone. All to avoid giving me the discount. A whole bunch of crooks. Don't stop there, I'm never going back to that shady place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHb2J2WldREAE
